text: Started release session: Publish README rewrite as root package 0.2.1

decision: Release a root-only patch because the public README changed while executable behavior and the runtime package remain unchanged.
risk: A version mismatch or stale tarball could leave npm showing the old instructions.

decision: Verify version consistency, packed README content, and the complete release gate.
risk: Publishing before registry and tarball verification would expose stale documentation.

notes: Full gate passed: 200 tests, coverage thresholds, build, package/adapters/examples/install/studio/setup/audit checks, zero vulnerabilities, SBOM validation, and root/runtime pack dry runs.

decision: Release gate passed and generated example fixtures were refreshed for package 0.2.1.
risk: Registry publication and GitHub Release still require post-push verification.

decision: Root package 0.2.1 changelog, version metadata, and README release scope are ready for Trusted Publishing.
risk: Do not publish runtime 0.1.3 again; verify the root dist-tag after workflow completion.

evidence: Release only @appsforgood/next-supabase-kit as patch 0.2.1; @appsforgood/agent-kit-runtime remains 0.1.3 because its package contents did not change.
Mitigated stale fixture and tarball risks by refreshing installed examples and passing the full release gate and npm pack dry runs.
npm run release:check passed before commit; registry and GitHub Release verification remain post-push acceptance evidence.
